$comment: Top tech + AI/ML employers that sponsor H-1B, EXCLUDING Amazon (plan §1, design §2.2). Tagged by connector tier; handles live-verified at build time (2026-06-21). clean_ats handles are confirmed against the public Greenhouse/Lever/Ashby JSON APIs. Workday + custom_site are sourcing-only (apply deferred). Hugging Face uses Workable (no v1 connector) so it is disabled. | Expanded by discover.mts: +91 live-verified clean_ats boards. | discover.mts pass: +53 live-verified clean_ats, +24 sourcing-only (Workday/custom). | discover.mts pass: +14 live-verified clean_ats, +0 sourcing-only (Workday/custom).
